EarlyClaimed(address,uint8,uint256,uint2.notice: Emitted when vested tokens are early claimed

VestingCreated(address,uint8,uint256,uin.notice: Emitted when a new vesting schedule is created

VestingReleased(address,uint8,uint256,ui.notice: Emitted when vested tokens are released

VestingRestaked(address,uint256,uint256,.notice: Emitted when vested tokens are restaked

VestingSlashed(address,uint8,uint256,uin.notice: Emitted when vested tokens are slashed

initialVesting(uint8,uint256,uint256,(ui.notice: Create a new vesting schedule with custom amounts and vesting days

releaseDelegatorAllVestedToken(uint256[].notice: Release all vested tokens for delegator

releaseHostAllVestedToken(uint256[],uint.notice: Release all vested tokens for host

restakeVestedToken(uint256,uint256,(uint.notice: Release vested tokens to stake fund holder for restake

settleSlash(uint256,uint256,(uint256[],u.notice: Settle penalty for slashing. Deducts from Vested Fee, Vested Reward, or Staking in order. Transfers ATH to SlashDeductionReceiver
